programmes.show_description: A workaholic is raped after attending a shady elite party with her boss.
Erin disagrees with a psychiatric consultant's diagnosis of a nanny accused of abuse, Eddie confronts her boss and a woman claims she heard someone plotting a murder.
After a woman's body is found at a men's-only club, Danny and Baez investigate whether it was an accident. Frank learns of an illicit affair involving the chief of Internal Affairs.
A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
One Last Score: US crime drama series. When the NCIS team learns of the murder of one of their former investigative assistants, they find that the victim has been selling information.
Out of the Frying Pan: US crime drama series. During an investigation into a drug-addicted teenager accused of patricide, Gibbs begins to question Vance's motives.
Tell-All: US crime drama series. A dying message from a naval officer leads the NCIS team to a manuscript that may hold a threat to national security.
Payback: US drama series about lawyers and police. After a mob informer is found dead, Briscoe and Green find that the trail leads to a contract killer with a cover story.
Married With Children: Crime drama. The death of a woman who fell from a hotel balcony leads detectives to a custody battle between the victim and her lesbian ex-partner.
City Hall: Drama series about law enforcement. Briscoe and Green investigate a shooting at city hall which leaves a councilman dead and a water inspector injured.
Crime drama. After a student jumps to his death from a dormitory window, it emerges that the boy was suffering side effects from an experimental antidepressant.
Crime drama. Two undercover officers are killed during a firearms sting and it emerges that their pictures had been posted on a website, alerting criminals to their identity.
Crime drama. A famous novelist dies from complications following plastic surgery. Evidence emerges that her surgeon made a crucial mistake and then ignored her pleas for help.
While investigating the crash of a military plane that was transporting caskets, the NCIS team discovers a discrepancy with the DNA remains.
The search into the disappearance of a marine lieutenant continues, with the trail leading to Afghanistan.
Tony's father claims to have no memory of the night when he is found inside a car containing a dead body in the boot.
When a narcotics officer is shot in the back, Brady heads to her former precinct to investigate. As the suspect's story unravels, she teams up with Shaw and Riley to uncover the truth.
Carisi must tread carefully when Maxwell's husband becomes a person of interest in an SVU investigation. Benson sends Velasco to take an old friend into custody.
Benson tries to help a student after she's assaulted on a field trip. Fin suspects a witness in the case may not be telling the whole truth.
When the case against a popular sports star falls through, Benson digs into the suspect's past to uncover additional victims; Velasco is disappointed when he meets one of his heroes.
The SVU hunts for a violent suspect who killed a detective's child; Rollins ponders a potential opportunity.
A year since Rossi nearly died at the hands of Everett Lynch, a.k.a. The Chameleon, he's developed some new theories, with inspiration from his former partner, Jason Gideon.
Jessica immerses herself in the medical profession when a young nurse is accused of murdering two patients to whom she was providing home care.
Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck, but the owner says otherwise.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
US crime drama series. Vance creates a task force to catch a serial killer who murders service personnel after they land in ports.
Dead Reflection: US crime drama series. When a Pentagon security camera catches a petty officer committing a murder, the NCIS team sets out to track down the killer.
Baltimore: US crime drama series. When Tony's former partner is found murdered and linked to the Port-to-Port serial killer, Tony remembers his days as a detective in Baltimore.
Veteran's Day: Drama series about law enforcement. A Gulf War veteran is arrested on suspicion of murdering an anti-war protester.
Can I Get A Witness: Crime drama series. A man is arrested for the fatal shooting of a teenager, only to escape conviction when the prosecution's star witness is murdered.
Hands Free: Drama series about law enforcement. Prosecutors attempt to convict a wealthy cross dresser of killing and dismembering his lover.
The wife of the Governor of Connecticut is murdered, leading police to uncover a gay love triangle involving her husband.
A notorious radio DJ survives an attempt on his life and detectives learn that the case is connected to the Mafia.
Crime drama. When a jeweller is shot dead in the middle of Times Square, detectives suspect he was killed because he betrayed his associates in the Russian mob.
After a Navy captain is murdered in his hotel room, the NCIS team has to find his pregnant companion and protect her from unknown assailants.
The NCIS team investigates the murder of a Navy lieutenant commander while dealing with her distraught husband. Ziva considers her future when Ray returns.
An investigation into the murder of a naval attache on holiday from Egypt is complicated by the intervention of her husband, who is also a detective.
Dr Reid suffers a brain injury, the BAU make a shocking discovery about Lynch that affects Rossi personally, and the team gathers to celebrate Rossi's retirement.
Benson and Carisi are baffled when a series of assaults have the same M.O. but different DNA at each scene. Muncy believes Elias Olsen has struck again and is determined to prove it.
In the last episode of the series, Benson and Stabler combine forces on a case that has now spread globally as they search for a revenge-for-hire crime ring.
Carisi and Rollins work together on an important arraignment. Benson tries to make Noah's Christmas wish come true when a case falls in her lap.
